headline: Ford, Unifor Ratify New Collective Agreement Reinforcing Ford's Long-Term Commitment to Canada
summary: Ford Motor Company of Canada, Limited and Unifor-represented hourly employees have ratified a new three-year national collective agreement, reinforcing Ford's long-term commitment to Canada. For 122 years, Ford has been part of the country's industrial landscape and this agreement continues that legacy by delivering meaningful gains for more than 5,000 Ford-Unifor represented employees.

headline: Unifor autoworkers ratify collective agreement with Ford Motor Company
summary: Unifor members employed at Ford Motor Company facilities across Canada have voted overwhelmingly in support of a new three-year collective agreement with the company.

raw.headline: Unifor autoworkers ratify collective agreement with Ford Motor Company
raw.summary: Unifor members employed at Ford Motor Company facilities across Canada have voted overwhelmingly in support of a new three-year collective agreement with the company.

headline: U.S. companies pouring swelling cash balances into growth plans - Morgan Stanley
summary: Investing.com -- Cash balances of U.S. companies swelled in the first quarter of 2026, with most companies aggressively deploying money back into their businesses, according to Morgan Stanley.
